'''Matthew "Matty" Fleming''' (born 13 January 1996) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} for the [[Widnes Vikings]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

Fleming played for [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]] in the [[Super League]], and on loan from [[St Helens R.F.C.|Saints]] at the [[Leigh Centurions]] in the top flight. He played for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[Betfred Championship|Championship]] and the [[Super League]], and spent time on loan from the [[London Broncos|Broncos]] at the [[London Skolars]] in [[2018 RFL League 1|League 1]].

==Personal==
He attended [[Bridgewater High School, Warrington]] and played junior rugby for Warrington Rugby Union Club until aged 16, when he joined the Wolves Scholarship programme, also playing for Bold Miners RLFC.{{citation needed|date=March 2023}}

==Career==
Fleming made his Saints début on 17 April 2015 in a [[Super League]] match against [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]].<ref name="loverugbyleague">{{cite web|url=http://www.loverugbyleague.com/stats/players/Matty-Fleming|title=Matty Fleming Player Stats|publisher=loverugbyleague.com|accessdate=2015-12-01|archive-date=10 December 2019|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20191210195110/https://www.loverugbyleague.com/stats/players/Matty-Fleming/|url-status=dead}}</ref>

Fleming made his first start for [[London Broncos|London]] in the round 3 victory over [[Featherstone Rovers]].
